dataList.name: Broken Means
dataList.desc: When the Arm is broken, the Arm gains 1 [Reduction] every turn

dataList.name: Apply Refracted Sinking
dataList.desc: When gaining [Sinking], gain 1 additional Potency and Count (does not apply on Cycle[TabExplain]-related buffs)

dataList.name: Returning Past
dataList.desc: At 50+ [AccumulatedPast], and if Core HP is at 80%-, the Core heals 200 HP by consuming 50 [AccumulatedPast] at Turn End

dataList.name: Misplaced Past
dataList.desc:
When the Body is broken, consume all [AccumulatedPast]
When the Body is broken, apply the following effects on the Body for this Encounter:
- Affinity Resist. becomes 0.5 starting from this turn
- Attack Type Resist. becomes 0.5 starting from the next turn

dataList.name: Broken Exhaust Port
dataList.desc:
When Steam Blaster is broken, completely lose [Breath] on all Parts
Once Steam Blaster is broken, every time this unit gains [Breath], gain 1 [Vulnerable] for every [Breath] gained
Once Steam Blaster is broken, lose 1 [Breath] On Use of an Attack Skill

dataList.name: Refracted Burn and Bleed
dataList.desc:
[Combustion] and [Laceration] Potency max out at 30
[Combustion] and [Laceration] Count max out at 5

dataList.name: Apply Refracted Sinking
dataList.desc: When gaining [Sinking], gain 1 additional Potency and Count (does not apply on Cycle[TabExplain]-related buffs)

dataList.name: Leaking Steam
dataList.desc: When Steam Blaster is hit, lose 1 [Breath] and 1 [Breath] Count

dataList.name: Overlapping Past
dataList.desc:
Gain 1 [Enhancement] for every 80 [AccumulatedPast] every turn
At 80+ [AccumulatedPast], gain +1 Slot

dataList.name: Metronome
dataList.desc:
If [AccumulatedPast] is an odd number, gain 3 [Vulnerable] and [AttackDmgUp]
If it is an even number, gain 3 [Protection] and [AttackDmgDown]

dataList.name: Broken Umbrella
dataList.desc: When the Body is broken, the Body gains 1 [AttackDmgDown] every turn

dataList.name: Ragged Umbrella
dataList.desc: When the Head is broken, gain 1 [AttackDmgDown] every turn

dataList.name: Last Struggle
dataList.desc:
At 15% HP, trigger the following effects:
- Gain 10 [Binding] and 1 [Reduction] every turn
- Newly spawned Old Umbrellas have 30% more HP
- Use "Cries Seeking Something" or "Pleading Cries" every turn

dataList.name: Vain Heart
dataList.desc:
Gain 2 [WaveFoxUmbrella] at the start of Turn 1 (max 6)
When gaining [WaveFoxUmbrella], gain additional [WaveFoxUmbrella] equal to the number of "Cycle Counts"
Gain [Protection] equal to [WaveFoxUmbrella] on self
If "Waiting" Skill is Slotted, spawn Old Umbrella equal to [WaveFoxUmbrella]

dataList.name: Refracted Rupture and Sinking
dataList.desc:
[Burst] and [Sinking] Potency max out at 30
[Burst] and [Sinking] Count max out at 5

dataList.name: Apply Refracted Bleed
dataList.desc: When gaining [Laceration], gain 1 additional Potency and Count (does not apply on Cycle[TabExplain]-related buffs)

dataList.name: Old and Abandoned
dataList.desc:
When this unit is defeated at Skill End of an Identity, the said Identity heals 10 SP and gains 2 [Agility] next turn 

When this unit is defeated, inflict 1 [ShardOfUmbrella] and 2 [Binding] on all Drifting Fox Parts

dataList.name: Golden Time
dataList.desc: Turn End: If the HP is between 6% and 24%, the Core and Parts instantly heal up to 80% of max HP, and this unit recovers from Stagger (once per Encounter)

dataList.name: Time Reversion Retroaction
dataList.desc: After activating Golden Time, gain 2 [Vulnerable] at the next Turn Start

dataList.name: Overcharge
dataList.desc: Turn End: At 5+ [Charge] Count, gain 3 [AttackDmgUp] next turn

dataList.name: Refracted Rupture and Sinking
dataList.desc:
[Burst] and [Sinking] Potency max out at 30
[Burst] and [Sinking] Count max out at 5

dataList.name: Apply Refracted Burn
dataList.desc: When gaining [Combustion], gain 1 additional Potency and Count (does not apply on Cycle[TabExplain]-related buffs)

dataList.name: Charmed
dataList.desc:
Inflict [FairyCharm] on the enemy with the slowest Speed
Number of [FairyCharm] targets increases with every Cycle Count
Number of [FairyCharm] targets increases when Fairy is restored

dataList.name: Uncovered Abyss
dataList.desc:
Reveal Body when Fairy is broken
All Buffs and Debuffs expire when the Body hides again

dataList.name: Leading Lure
dataList.desc:
Cannot damage Core by damaging the Fairy
Targets more Slots based on the number of [FairyCharm] enemies

dataList.name: Broken Stump
dataList.desc:
When the Body is broken:
- Fairy will have 60% of its max HP upon restoration
- Core heals +20 more HP from Skill effects

dataList.name: Evolving Lure
dataList.desc: Fairy gains 30% increased max HP with each restoration

dataList.name: Refracted Rupture and Sinking
dataList.desc:
[Burst] and [Sinking] Potency max out at 30
[Burst] and [Sinking] Count max out at 5

dataList.name: Fairy Dust
dataList.desc: When the Fairy is killed, all Identities gain 5 [Breath] and +2 [Breath] Count next turn

dataList.name: Deteriorated Persistence
dataList.desc: If Shield HP is fully depleted after using a Defense Skill, all Parts gain 3 [AttackDown] and 3 [Vulnerable] next turn

dataList.name: Solid Exoskeleton
dataList.desc: If Head is not broken, the Body gains 3 [Protection] every turn

dataList.name: Self-charge
dataList.desc:
Gain 3 [SelfCharge] at the start of Turn 1
Gain 1 additional [SelfCharge] for each Cycle Count (max 8)

dataList.name: Living Nerves
dataList.desc:
Upon death, all Skills are cancelled for the turn
Gain 10 [SelfCharge] when the effect above activates

dataList.name: Refracted Bleed and Tremor
dataList.desc:
[Laceration] and [Vibration] Potency max out at 30
[Laceration] and [Vibration] Count max out at 5

dataList.name: Refracted Charge
dataList.desc: On Hit: If target has [Charge], reduce target's [Charge] Count by 1 and gain 1 [SelfCharge] (3 times per turn, including 'Unique Charge', excluding 'Unique Charge' with fixed Potency)

dataList.name: Reminisced Augmentation
dataList.desc: When the Left Arm is broken, gain 4 [Reduction] every turn

dataList.name: Enticing Fairy Wine
dataList.desc: Turn Start: When Fairy Wine is on the field, all Parts gain 5 [Binding]

dataList.name: Fairy Wine
dataList.desc:
At 0 HP, inflict 5 [TipsinessRail] on 3 random Identities next turn, and inflict 5 [ParryingResultDown] on the other Identities next turn

Turn End: Fairy Wine is removed from the field; Fairy Gentleman heals 10% Core HP and gains 2 [Enhancement], 2 [Agility], and 2 [Protection] next turn

dataList.name: Lost Means
dataList.desc: When the Left Arm is broken, gain 4 [Reduction] every turn

dataList.name: Damaged Shade
dataList.desc: When the Head is broken, gain 5 [DefenseDown] every turn

dataList.name: Contaminating Leaf
dataList.desc:
Apply the following effects on Fairy-Long-Legs and Fairy Gentleman:
- Turn Start: Gain 1 [Enhancement]
- Turn End: Gain 1 [Enhancement] and 1 [AttackDmgUp] next turn (gain +1 more every turn)

dataList.name: Dimensional Escape
dataList.desc:
Starting from Turn 2, this unit summons 4 random Dimensions and hides
- When all Parts are Staggered, this effect activates next turn
- Cannot be Staggered while hidden inside a "Dimensional Rift"

dataList.name: Trapped Dimensional Escape
dataList.desc:
When all "Dimensional Rifts" are broken, this unit voluntarily emerges from a "Dimensional Rift" next turn
Afterward, this unit loses 5 [Charge] Count and all of its Parts' Stagger Thresholds are raised by 30

dataList.name: Regenerate Dimensional Refraction Blade
dataList.desc:
When the Blade Part is broken, lose 5 [Charge] Count
At the next Turn End, consume 2 [Charge] Count to restore the broken Blade

While the Blade Part is broken, gain 2 [AttackDown] at every Turn Start

dataList.name: Forced Dimensional Breach Attempt - Partial Deterrence Release
dataList.desc:
At 60% or less Core HP, end turn and gain a new pattern
- Deactivate "Dimensional Escape" Passive
- Deactivate "Trapped Dimensional Escape" Passive
- If neither of the arms is broken, use a powerful Skill every few turns

dataList.name: Hemorrhaging Dimension
dataList.desc: Deal +10% damage after passing through the Hemorrhaging Dimension[TabExplain]

dataList.name: Poisonous Dimension
dataList.desc: Core gains +20% max HP after passing through the Poisonous Dimension[TabExplain]

dataList.name: Tremoring Dimension
dataList.desc: Min & Max Speed +1 after passing through the Tremoring Dimension[TabExplain]

dataList.name: Electrifying Dimension
dataList.desc: Coin Power +1 after passing through the Electrifying Dimension[TabExplain]

dataList.name: Eternal Yoke
dataList.desc:
Max HP increases by (Cycle Count x 5)%
Deal -(Cycle Count x 5)% damage

dataList.name: Broken Sign
dataList.desc: When the Sign is broken, Rose loses 20% max HP

dataList.name: Scattered Flesh
dataList.desc: When the Flesh is broken, Core loses 20% max HP

dataList.name: Singular Vine
dataList.desc:
When a Rose is defeated, Core and Flesh lose 30 HP
- Gain 0.1 Resistance to the corresponding Sin Affinity for this Encounter (Stackable)

dataList.name: Sin-drenched Brambles
dataList.desc: Every turn, all Parts gain 1 [Protection] and 4 [DefenseUp] for every Sinner that has the [PrepareSinRose] effect

dataList.name: Blossoming Sins
dataList.desc: At 4 [BloomingRose], enter [EnhanceRose] for this Encounter

dataList.name: Rose on a Vine
dataList.desc: Dies when the Core of Sign of Roses is killed

dataList.name: Hatred
dataList.desc: When hit, gain 1 [AttackUp] and 1 [DefenseDown] next turn

dataList.name: Embers
dataList.desc: When defeated, return the damage to the attacker and inflict 5 [Combustion]

dataList.name: Boiling Wrath
dataList.desc:
If this unit is in [EnhanceRose], inflict +1 more [Combustion] using Skill effects
If killed while in [EnhanceRose], inflict +4 [Combustion] Count to all allies

dataList.name: Shimmering Lust
dataList.desc:
If this unit is in [EnhanceRose], inflict +1 more [Laceration] using Skill effects
If killed while in [EnhanceRose], inflict +4 [Laceration] Count to all allies

dataList.name: Powerless
dataList.desc: When hit, gain 5 [Protection] next turn unless Staggered

dataList.name: Crushing Sloth
dataList.desc:
If this unit is in [EnhanceRose], inflict +1 more [Vibration] using Skill effects
If killed while in [EnhanceRose], inflict +4 [Vibration] Count to all allies

dataList.name: Hunger
dataList.desc: Turn End: If this unit failed to deal damage this turn, gain 2 [BurstVulnerable] next turn

dataList.name: Growing Gluttony
dataList.desc:
If this unit is in [EnhanceRose], inflict +1 more [Burst] using Skill effects
If killed while in [EnhanceRose], inflict +4 [Burst] Count to all allies

dataList.name: Self Destruction
dataList.desc: When hit, change Gloom Resist. to Weak(1.5) and gain 5 [Protection] next turn

dataList.name: Shimmering Gloom
dataList.desc:
If this unit is in [EnhanceRose], inflict +1 more [Sinking] using Skill effects
If killed while in [EnhanceRose], inflict +4 [Sinking] Count to all allies

dataList.name: Overinflated Pride
dataList.desc:
Turn Start: If this unit is in [EnhanceRose], apply +1 more [Breath] using Skill effects
If killed while in [EnhanceRose], apply +4 [Breath] Count on all enemies

dataList.name: Glaring Envy
dataList.desc:
Turn Start: If this unit is in [EnhanceRose], apply +1 more [Charge] Count using Skill effects
If killed while in [EnhanceRose], apply +4 [Charge] Count on all enemies
